children.text: Special rules for disability retirement and death-in-service benefits with respect to certain employees
Officers and employees to whom section 2051 rules apply
Notwithstanding any other provision of law, an officer or employee of the Central Intelligence Agency subject to retirement system coverage under subchapter III of chapter 83 of title 5 who—
has five years of civilian service credit toward retirement under such subchapter III of chapter 83, title 5;

children.tail: as a participant in the Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability System;

children.text: has become disabled during a period of assignment to the performance of duties that are qualifying toward such designation under such
satisfies the requirements for disability retirement under
shall, upon his own application or upon order of the Director, be retired on an annuity computed in accordance with the rules prescribed in

children.tail: , in lieu of an annuity computed as provided by

children.text: Survivors of officers and employees to whom section 2052 rules apply

Notwithstanding any other provision of law, in the case of an officer or employee of the Central Intelligence Agency subject to retirement system coverage under subchapter III of chapter 83, title 5, who—
has at least eighteen months of civilian service credit toward retirement under such subchapter III of chapter 83, title 5;

children.tail: So in original. The comma probably should not appear.
as a participant in the Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability System;

children.text: prior to separation or retirement from the Agency, dies during a period of assignment to the performance of duties that are qualifying toward such designation under such
is survived by a surviving spouse, former spouse, or child as defined in

children.tail: , who would otherwise be entitled to an annuity under

children.text: such surviving spouse, former spouse, or child of such officer or employee shall be entitled to an annuity computed in accordance with

children.tail: , in lieu of an annuity computed in accordance with

children.text: Annuities under this section deemed annuities under chapter 83 of title 5

The annuities provided under subsections (a) and (b) of this section shall be deemed to be annuities under chapter 83 of title 5 for purposes of the other provisions of such chapter and other laws (including title 26) relating to such annuities, and shall be payable from the Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability Fund maintained pursuant to
Pub. L. 118–31, div. G, title IX, § 7901(g)(5)
